title: Pay off or Invest?
needLoan: Add a loan first to use this simulator.
subtitle: Compare the impact of paying down the loan vs investing the same amount.
resetTitle: Reset to the defaults from your loan and portfolio
freqMonthlyHint: The same amount every month, over the loan's life.
freqAnnualHint: The same amount every year, over the loan's life.
modePrazoHint: The payment stays the same, you finish sooner.
modePrestacaoHint: The term stays the same, the payment drops.
returnPortfolioHint: Projected from your portfolio: {{value}} % per year (value-weighted).
returnPortfolioEmpty: No assets — use a manual return.
recAmortizarTitle: Paying down is the better option
recAmortizarSub: You save {{saved}} in interest vs {{gain}} net gain from investing.
recInvestirSub: You earn {{gain}} net from investing vs {{saved}} saved in interest.
recEquivSub: The difference between the two options is under €100.
breakEvenAbove: At {{value}} % you beat the break-even point — investing wins.
breakEvenBelow: At {{value}} % you're below the break-even point — paying down wins.

risk.label: INVESTMENT RISK
risk.robustInvest: Even in the bad scenario, investing beats what you'd save by paying down.
risk.fragileInvest: Investing wins on average, but in the bad scenario the guaranteed {{saved}} saved by paying down could be better.
risk.robustAmortize: Paying down wins — and with no market risk.
risk.coverage: Risk computed on {{value}} % of the portfolio (no history for the rest).
